@sample @demo @reference: DL-13 layout/geometry check (I-17B mobile UI verification).
carrier: React Native frame / bounding-box metadata via Detox (onLayout/element frames) or platform layout snapshots

rules.description: no unintended intersection of declared non-overlapping elements (frame/stacking metadata)
no visible content cut off without an allowed truncation rule (scroll/overflow/text metrics)
no essential element offscreen/outside viewport without a valid scroll affordance
required elements do not disappear/reorder incompatibly or exceed viewport bounds per device profile

advisory_boundary: screenshot-only or LLM-only spacing/alignment observations without deterministic geometry are advisory-only (DL-13).
